column1: Hey AJ, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Sup AJ, saw you made your deposit for our Krystal package. I'll be your rep if you have any questions or need help with anything between now and the end of your trip
I have a group of friends who all booked earlier this month I believe and they said they got the all 5 day party package and the cruise one. Is there anyway for me to get both of those as well?
yea for sure. looks like you have the 5 night party package added. want me to add the booze cruise in there as well?
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
my b bro that text wasn't meant for you, didnt even realize lol
If you need anything else tho hmu whenever! I got you
My guy, was looking at my account and it shows u only have $1708 due but then it says that the $200 deposit is unpaid but I know I paid it
whats good bro. I see your $200 payment in there, thats payment #1. your final balance is the $1708 due 2/02
Bet, I can pay that on the 2nd? I'm supposed to get paid on 2nd
yea the 2nd is the due date yup
Liked “yea the 2nd is the due date yup”
I can give you a call. what time you thinkin
If u can right now is perfect
word will be from our main line an 888 number
